samples.text: All sparrows are birds. A penguin is a bird. Is a penguin a sparrow?
Every member of sparrows is among birds. A penguin is a bird. Does it follow that a penguin is a sparrow?
All songbirds are avians. A penguin is an avian. Is a penguin a songbird?
Being a bird does not by itself make something a sparrow. A penguin is a bird. Is a penguin a sparrow?
All sparrows are birds. A penguin is a bird. A blue car is parked outside. Is a penguin a sparrow?
